steps.title: Spot the chronological progression
steps.content: The passage presents years in sequence—1965, then 1994 and 1996—signaling a forward movement in time from the first syndicated strip to later ones.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Later” directly marks this progression from 1965 to subsequent years. The other three fail: “That is” restates; “Previously” reverses the timeline; “For example” introduces examples without expressing temporal progression. That matches choice D — D is correct.
